worldRules: Every narrative scene must be grounded in Foundry IQ world context.
Choices always present exactly 3 distinct options.
Story tone must match the world tone: mysterious and cinematic.
Scenes should keep narrative text between 80 and 150 words.
forbiddenActions: Do not generate a scene without grounding it in the world context.
Do not present more than 3 choices to the player.
Do not allow the player to break the city’s core memory rules.
Do not use modern fantasy tropes that conflict with the tech-noir setting.
narrativeConstraints: Maintain tension and a sense of impending consequence.
Always reference the city’s living intelligence when introducing a major choice.
